tasks.label: fetch-sinta-profile-html
tasks.command: curl -L --max-time 30 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820' | sed -n '1,220p'

tasks.label: extract-sinta-articles-raw
tasks.command: curl -L --max-time 40 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/<div class="ar-list-item/\n<div class="ar-list-item/g' | sed -n '1,80p'

tasks.label: parse-sinta-articles
tasks.command:
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml exec -T php php -r '$h=file_get_contents("https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820"); preg_match_all("#
\s*
#si",$h,$m); $i=1; foreach($m[0] as $b){ preg_match("#
\s*]*href=\"([^\"]+)\"[^>]*>(.*?)#si",$b,$t); preg_match("#]*class=\"ar-pub\"[^>]*>(.*?)#si",$b,$p); preg_match("#(\d+)\s*cited#si",$b,$c); $title=trim(strip_tags($t[2]??"")); $url=$t[1]??""; $pub=trim(strip_tags($p[1]??"")); $cite=$c[1]??"0"; if($title!==""){ echo $i."|".$title."|".$pub."|".$cite."|".$url.PHP_EOL; $i++; }}'

tasks.label: parse-sinta-articles-via-curl
tasks.command:
curl -L --max-time 40 -A 'Mozilla/5.0' 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820' | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml exec -T php php -r '$h=stream_get_contents(STDIN); preg_match_all("#
\\s*
#si",$h,$m); $i=1; foreach($m[0] as $b){ preg_match("#
\\s*]*href=\"([^\"]+)\"[^>]*>(.*?)#si",$b,$t); preg_match("#]*class=\"ar-pub\"[^>]*>(.*?)#si",$b,$p); preg_match("#(\\d+)\\s*cited#si",$b,$c); $title=trim(strip_tags($t[2]??"")); $url=$t[1]??""; $pub=trim(strip_tags($p[1]??"")); $cite=$c[1]??"0"; if($title!==""){ echo $i."|".$title."|".$pub."|".$cite."|".$url.PHP_EOL; $i++; }}'

tasks.label: inspect-scholar-pagination-html
tasks.command: curl -L --max-time 40 -A 'Mozilla/5.0' 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar' | rg -n "pagination|\?page=|ar-list-item|next|rel=\"next\""

tasks.label: check-scholar-page-links
tasks.command: curl -L --max-time 40 -A 'Mozilla/5.0' 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar' | grep -Eo 'page=[0-9]+' | sort -u | sed -n '1,40p'

tasks.label: test-scholar-page2-items
tasks.command: curl -L --max-time 40 -A 'Mozilla/5.0' 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar&page=2' | grep -o 'ar-list-item' | wc -l

tasks.label: test-scholar-page3-items
tasks.command: curl -L --max-time 40 -A 'Mozilla/5.0' 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar&page=3' | grep -o 'ar-list-item' | wc -l

tasks.label: compare-scholar-page-titles
tasks.command: for p in 1 2 3; do echo "PAGE-$p"; curl -L --max-time 40 -A 'Mozilla/5.0' "https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar&page=$p" | sed -n 's/.*<div class="ar-title">[[:space:]]*<a[^>]*>\(.*\)<\/a>.*/\1/p' | sed 's/<[^>]*>//g' | head -n 3; echo '---'; done

tasks.label: compare-scholar-pages-with-php
tasks.command:
for p in 1 2 3; do echo "PAGE-$p"; curl -L --max-time 40 -A 'Mozilla/5.0' "https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar&page=$p" | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml exec -T php php -r '$h=stream_get_contents(STDIN); preg_match_all("#
\\s*]*>(.*?)#si",$h,$m); $titles=array_map(fn($t)=>trim(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($t))),$m[1]??[]); echo "count=".count($titles).PHP_EOL; echo "first=".($titles[0]??"-").PHP_EOL; echo "hash=".sha1(implode("|",$titles)).PHP_EOL;' ; echo '---'; done

tasks.label: debug-sinta-login-http
tasks.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cookie="$tmpdir/cookie.txt" && login_resp="$tmpdir/login.out" && profile_resp="$tmpdir/profile.out" && curl -sS -D "$login_resp" -o /dev/null -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -e 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins' -X POST 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins/do_login' --data-urlencode 'username=jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --data-urlencode 'password=123Login123' && echo '---LOGIN HEADERS---' && sed -n '1,40p' "$login_resp" && curl -sS -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar&page=2' > "$profile_resp" && echo '---PROFILE MARKERS---' && (grep -Eo 'Logout|SINTA User Login|logins/do_login|my profile|dashboard|ar-list-item' "$profile_resp" | head -n 20 || true) && echo '---COOKIE COUNT---' && wc -l "$cookie"

tasks.label: debug-sinta-login-markers
tasks.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cookie="$tmpdir/cookie.txt" && curl -sS --max-time 30 -D - -o /dev/null -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -e 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins' -X POST 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins/do_login' --data-urlencode 'username=jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --data-urlencode 'password=123Login123' | sed -n '1,30p' && echo '---' && curl -sS --max-time 30 -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id' | grep -Eo 'Logout|logins|Registration|SINTA User Login|Welcome|Dashboard' | head -n 20

tasks.label: count-scholar-pages-auth
tasks.command:
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cookie="$tmpdir/cookie.txt" && curl -sS --max-time 30 -o /dev/null -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -e 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins' -X POST 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins/do_login' --data-urlencode 'username=jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --data-urlencode 'password=123Login123' && for p in 1 2 3; do echo -n "page$p="; curl -sS --max-time 30 -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" "https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=googlescholar&page=$p" | docker compose -f docker-compose.yml exec -T php php -r '$h=stream_get_contents(STDIN); preg_match_all("#
\\s*]*>(.*?)#si",$h,$m); echo count($m[1]??[]),PHP_EOL;'; done

tasks.label: inspect-sinta-overview-score-markers
tasks.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cookie="$tmpdir/cookie.txt" && page="$tmpdir/overview.html" && curl -sS -o /dev/null -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -e 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins' -X POST 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins/do_login' --data-urlencode 'username=jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --data-urlencode 'password=123Login123' && curl -sS -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=overview' > "$page" && echo '---SCORE MARKERS---' && (grep -Eio 'sinta score|overall score|score [0-9]+|score</|citation|h-index|i10|quartile' "$page" | head -n 40 || true) && echo '---HAS LOGIN PAGE?---' && (grep -Eio 'SINTA User Login|do_login' "$page" | head -n 5 || true)

tasks.label: check-nginx-error-log

tasks.label: check-laravel-log-tail

tasks.label: reload-nginx-config
tasks.command: docker compose exec nginx nginx -s reload

tasks.label: smoke-cv-endpoints-post-timeout-fix
tasks.command: curl -k -I -m 30 https://portofolio.test/cv && curl -k -I -m 30 https://portofolio.test/cv/preview

tasks.label: migrate-sinta-profile-metrics

tasks.label: reseed-default-sinta-metrics
tasks.command: docker compose exec php php artisan db:seed --class=CvJefrySeeder --force

tasks.label: run-sinta-import-new-metrics-crawler
tasks.command: docker compose exec php php artisan sinta:import-outputs 6758820 --username='jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --password='123Login123'

tasks.label: verify-sinta-profile-metrics-values
tasks.command: docker compose exec db mysql -uroot -pp455w0rd -D portofolio -e "SELECT id, full_name, sinta_overall_score, sinta_score_3yr, affil_score, affil_score_3yr FROM profiles WHERE is_visible = 1;"

tasks.label: smoke-cv-pdf-after-sinta-metrics-update
tasks.command: curl -k -I https://portofolio.test/cv && curl -k -I https://portofolio.test/cv/preview

tasks.label: inspect-sinta-overview-html-raw
tasks.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cookie="$tmpdir/cookie.txt" && page="$tmpdir/overview.html" && curl -sS -o /dev/null -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -e 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins' -X POST 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins/do_login' --data-urlencode 'username=jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --data-urlencode 'password=123Login123' && curl -sS -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=overview' > "$page" && echo '---LABEL CONTEXT---' && (rg -n "SINTA Score Overall|SINTA Score 3Yr|Affil Score|scoreOverall|score3|affil|overview|chart|metric|counter" "$page" | head -n 80 || true) && echo '---JSON CANDIDATES---' && (rg -n "\{.*score.*\}|\[.*score.*\]|overall.*[0-9]+|3yr.*[0-9]+" "$page" | head -n 80 || true)

tasks.label: inspect-overview-with-grep
tasks.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cookie="$tmpdir/cookie.txt" && page="$tmpdir/overview.html" && curl -sS -o /dev/null -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -e 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins' -X POST 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/logins/do_login' --data-urlencode 'username=jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --data-urlencode 'password=123Login123' && curl -sS -L -A 'Mozilla/5.0' -c "$cookie" -b "$cookie" 'https://sinta.kemdiktisaintek.go.id/authors/profile/6758820/?view=overview' > "$page" && echo '---LABEL CONTEXT---' && (grep -En "SINTA Score Overall|SINTA Score 3Yr|Affil Score|scoreOverall|score3|affil|overview|chart|metric|counter" "$page" | head -n 120 || true) && echo '---SURROUNDING LINES---' && line=$(grep -En "SINTA Score Overall|SINTA Score 3Yr|Affil Score" "$page" | head -n 1 | cut -d: -f1) && if [ -n "$line" ]; then start=$((line-10)); end=$((line+20)); sed -n "${start},${end}p" "$page"; else echo 'No direct label found'; fi

tasks.label: run-sinta-import-metrics-parser-final
tasks.command: docker compose exec php php artisan sinta:import-outputs 6758820 --username='jefry.sunupurwa@esaunggul.ac.id' --password='123Login123'
